# confinia.github.io

Live demo of the [Confinia API](https://api.confinia.io) — French communes through time (MapLibre GL JS time-slider).

**Deployed from `confinia-core/demo/` — do not edit here; changes land via `make demo-publish`.**

Data: INSEE COG · IGN Admin Express (Licence Ouverte 2.0, attribution « IGN — Admin Express »).
